name: Naomi is lonely on her birthday
description: Poor Naomi doesn't have anyone to spend time with on her birthday. It seems like everyone forgot or they just don't care. She shows up to work hoping everyone will sing her happy birthday, but no one does. In fact, no one even mentions her birthday. She ran off to a bench and cried her eyes out, hoping someone would recognize her sadness and cheer her up.
creator: Dussysill
